description:
Buttrey Food & Drug has ordered 10 custom industrial wind turbines at $500 each. Wind Power LLC must manufacture these units from raw materials and fulfill the complete order-to-cash cycle.

Create a new finished-good item called 'WP Industrial Turbine' (Item Group: Products, Stock UOM: Nos, maintain stock enabled, standard selling rate $500). Create and submit a Bill of Materials for this item with the following raw materials per unit: 1 Shaft, 3 Wing Sheets, 1 Upper Bearing Plate, 1 Base Plate.

Create and submit a Sales Order for Buttrey Food & Drug for 10 WP Industrial Turbines at $500 each, with delivery date one month from today. Create a Work Order for 10 units from the Sales Order. Start production by transferring raw materials to the Work-In-Progress warehouse (Stock Entry: Material Transfer for Manufacture). Complete production (Stock Entry: Manufacture) to produce 10 finished turbines into the Finished Goods warehouse.

Create and submit a Delivery Note from the Sales Order. Create and submit a Sales Invoice from the Delivery Note. Record a Payment Entry to fully settle the invoice so the customer's outstanding balance is zero.

All raw materials are pre-stocked in the Stores warehouse. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
